name: Lady in Mystery
short_description: Welcome to a small detective agency in old Seoul. Lady in Mystery is a Yuri mystery visual novel set in 18th-century Joseon. Choose one of four women to grow closest to Heesoo, the disguised detective. Your choices may lead to love, revenge, or darker paths than you imagined.
detailed_description:
Lady in Mystery

A Yuri Mystery Visual Novel set in 18th-century Joseon.

A woman hiding behind a man’s name.
A runaway noble girl with a secret.
When their paths cross, truth and desire begin to unravel.

About the Game

Lady in Mystery is a Yuri mystery visual novel set in 18th-century Korea,
where disguise, love, and truth intertwine beneath the strict Confucian order.

Once an ordinary noble girl, Heesoo lost everything when her family was executed under false charges.
Disguised as a man, she escapes to the capital and opens an information shop called Jeonghuso,
gathering whispers and solving cases to survive.

Five years later, just as she begins to rebuild her life,
a runaway noblewoman named Juhee appears—
and Heesoo’s carefully constructed world begins to crack.

Features

  • 🌸 A mystery & Yuri visual novel set in 18th-century Joseon

  • 💌 4 romance routes, each with unique investigations and storylines

  • 🔍 30+ endings, including 5 true endings shaped by your choices

  • 🎨 Rich CGs and atmospheric backgrounds inspired by Korean traditional art

  • 🕯️ Stories of deception, love, and identity in a society bound by rules

Your Choices Define Her Fate

Love or Revenge.
Truth or Disguise.
Every decision brings you closer to one truth—
or to the darkness that lies beneath.
